name: SORT_UNION_TRANSPOSE_MATCH_NULL_FETCH
conditions: UNION ALL with ORDER BY (no OFFSET)
transformations: Push ORDER BY to each SELECT in UNION ALL, keep original ORDER BY after UNION

name: PROJECT_CORRELATE_TRANSPOSE
conditions: Projection over correlated subquery (no window functions)
transformations: Push projections down to inner/outer queries, adjust correlation conditions

name: FILTER_MERGE
conditions: Nested queries with WHERE clauses on same data
transformations: Merge WHERE conditions using AND

name: JOIN_ADD_REDUNDANT_SEMI_JOIN
conditions: INNER JOIN between tables X and Y
transformations: Add semi-join filter using EXISTS or IN subquery to pre-filter X

name: AGGREGATE_EXPAND_DISTINCT_AGGREGATES
conditions: DISTINCT aggregates (COUNT, SUM, MIN, MAX) on same column
transformations: Remove DISTINCT, use GROUP BY; split if different columns

name: AGGREGATE_UNION_TRANSPOSE
transformations: Push aggregates to each UNION branch, combine with final aggregate

name: JOIN_CONDITION_PUSH
conditions: WHERE conditions on single table in JOIN
transformations: Move conditions to ON clause or subquery

name: SORT_REMOVE_CONSTANT_KEYS
conditions: ORDER BY with constant expressions (no LIMIT/OFFSET)
transformations: Remove constant expressions from ORDER BY

name: AGGREGATE_JOIN_REMOVE
conditions: GROUP BY after LEFT/RIGHT JOIN, unused columns from join side
transformations: Remove unnecessary JOIN, adjust SELECT and GROUP BY

name: AGGREGATE_PROJECT_MERGE
conditions: Simple GROUP BY with direct column aggregates
transformations: Merge projection with aggregation, remove redundant SELECT layers

name: PROJECT_WINDOW_TRANSPOSE
transformations: Create subquery with only required columns, apply window functions

name: FILTER_VALUES_MERGE
transformations: Apply filters directly to VALUES tuples

name: FILTER_SET_OP_TRANSPOSE
transformations: Push WHERE conditions to each input query

name: JOIN_PROJECT_BOTH_TRANSPOSE_INCLUDE_OUTER
conditions: Projections on both sides of JOIN
transformations: Move projections above JOIN, combine into single SELECT

name: AGGREGATE_MERGE
conditions: Nested GROUP BY with compatible aggregates
transformations: Combine GROUP BY operations, merge compatible aggregates

name: AGGREGATE_UNION_AGGREGATE_FIRST
conditions: UNION ALL with GROUP BY (no aggregates)
transformations: Remove GROUP BY from branches, apply single GROUP BY after UNION

name: SORT_UNION_TRANSPOSE
conditions: UNION ALL with ORDER BY and LIMIT
transformations: Push ORDER BY and LIMIT to each SELECT, add final ORDER BY and LIMIT

name: AGGREGATE_JOIN_JOIN_REMOVE
conditions: Redundant LEFT JOIN in nested JOIN
transformations: Remove redundant JOIN, adjust JOIN conditions

name: PROJECT_SUB_QUERY_TO_CORRELATE
transformations: Convert to LEFT JOIN with aggregate functions

name: AGGREGATE_REDUCE_FUNCTIONS
transformations: Replace with basic aggregates (SUM, COUNT, etc.)

name: AGGREGATE_VALUES
transformations: Replace with literal values (0 for COUNT/SUM, NULL for MIN/MAX)

name: AGGREGATE_REMOVE
conditions: GROUP BY on all SELECT columns without aggregates
transformations: Remove GROUP BY, use DISTINCT if needed

name: SEMI_JOIN_JOIN_TRANSPOSE
transformations: Move semi-join to subquery, adjust JOIN structure

name: FILTER_SUB_QUERY_TO_CORRELATE
transformations: Convert to JOIN operations

name: PROJECT_VALUES_MERGE
transformations: Apply SELECT expressions directly to VALUES tuples

name: UNION_REMOVE
transformations: Remove redundant UNION ALL

name: PROJECT_TO_LOGICAL_PROJECT_AND_WINDOW
transformations: Separate window functions into outer query, non-window expressions in subquery

name: FILTER_INTO_JOIN
transformations: Move conditions to ON clause or subqueries

name: SEMI_JOIN_PROJECT_TRANSPOSE
transformations: Move semi-join to base table, apply projection after

name: UNION_TO_DISTINCT
transformations: Replace with UNION ALL + DISTINCT

name: UNION_PULL_UP_CONSTANTS
transformations: Extract constants to outer SELECT

name: JOIN_SUB_QUERY_TO_CORRELATE
transformations: Convert to JOIN with aggregate functions

name: SORT_REMOVE
conditions: ORDER BY on pre-sorted data (no LIMIT/OFFSET)
transformations: Remove redundant ORDER BY

name: SORT_JOIN_TRANSPOSE
conditions: ORDER BY on single table in OUTER JOIN
transformations: Move ORDER BY to subquery before JOIN

name: JOIN_LEFT_UNION_TRANSPOSE
conditions: JOIN with UNION ALL on left side
transformations: Apply JOIN to each UNION branch, combine with UNION ALL

name: PROJECT_JOIN_REMOVE

name: AGGREGATE_ANY_PULL_UP_CONSTANTS
transformations: Remove constants from GROUP BY, add to SELECT

name: FILTER_TABLE_FUNCTION_TRANSPOSE
transformations: Move conditions to input of table function

name: FILTER_PROJECT_TRANSPOSE
conditions: WHERE clause after SELECT transformations (no window functions)
transformations: Move WHERE conditions before transformations

name: JOIN_PUSH_EXPRESSIONS
transformations: Create computed columns in subqueries, simplify JOIN conditions

name: AGGREGATE_JOIN_TRANSPOSE_EXTENDED

name: AGGREGATE_CASE_TO_FILTER
transformations: Replace CASE with FILTER clause

name: AGGREGATE_UNION_AGGREGATE_SECOND

name: PROJECT_REMOVE
transformations: Remove unnecessary SELECT layers

transformations: Simplify constant expressions in JOIN conditions

name: WINDOW_REDUCE_EXPRESSIONS
transformations: Simplify expressions in window functions

name: FILTER_REDUCE_EXPRESSIONS
transformations: Remove always-true conditions, replace always-false with empty result

name: PROJECT_FILTER_TRANSPOSE

transformations: Move WHERE conditions before SELECT transformations

transformations: Remove redundant JOIN, adjust JOIN conditions

transformations: Merge projection with aggregation, optimize aggregate functions

transformations: Add inferred conditions to JOIN inputs

transformations: Merge compatible SELECT operations

transformations: Push non-window expressions to input queries

transformations: Push SELECT to each side of JOIN
